subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and steadfast in the Testament! Praise be unto God that thou dost ever occupy thyself with service and cast forth the net of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و راسخ بر پیمان الحمد لله همواره بخدمت پردازی و دام هدایت در
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
